title: selaginella beccariana
intro: Selaginella beccariana, also known as Resurrection Fern, is a species of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginella genus, characterized by its ability to revive itself after being dried out due to drought or other environmental stressors. The medicinal properties of Selaginella beccariana include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing the risk of cancer, improving cardiovascular health, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Selaginella beccariana can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world to treat a range of ailments.
